name: Agent Health
core_question: How does a distributed system heal itself, and what can medicine learn from it?
description: Self-healing, circuit breakers, immune responses, heartbeat monitoring, recovery from failure. The medicine of computational organisms.
human_world_bridge: Self-healing patterns in distributed systems are strikingly parallel to biological healing. Circuit breakers mirror immune responses. Heartbeat monitoring mirrors vital signs. Cascading failures mirror sepsis. Research here informs both systems engineering AND medical understanding of complex organism recovery.
research_axes: Circuit breaker design vs. biological immune response
Health metrics: what makes a 'healthy' federation node?
Recovery time objectives: how fast must healing happen?
